CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please select the category which best describes your level of experience:
CustomField.label: LIMS experience

value.fullName: Limited - I would require a complete refresh or assistance using it
value.label: Limited - I would require a complete refresh or assistance using it

value.fullName: Intermediate - I would require a brief introduction and then would be comfortable using it
value.label: Intermediate - I would require a brief introduction and then would be comfortable using it

value.fullName: Advanced - I know how to use LIMS system and could lead and train others
value.label: Advanced - I know how to use LIMS system and could lead and train others
